name: SCC_CreateServiceDetailRes_ISO
title: SCC_CreateServiceDetailRes_ISO
syntax: long SCC_CreateServiceDetailRes_ISO ( byte SessionID[], char ResponseCode[], dword ServiceID )
description: Creates a Service Detail Response message for sending.

parameters.name: SessionID
parameters.description: 8-byte long SessionID of SCC connection, range: 0 - 0xFF FF FF FF FF FF FF FF.
